md013._comment: Line length: disabled. Prose-style markdown uses one paragraph per line; CommonMark / GFM doesn't care about line length.

md024._comment: Multiple headings with the same content: allow when they're siblings under different parents (CHANGELOG has ### Added under every ## [version]).

md036._comment: Emphasis-as-heading: this repo intentionally uses **Inputs:** / **Notes:** / **Requires:** as in-paragraph labels in the blueprint notes and docs. Promoting these to real headings would push every blueprint section to a 4-deep nesting and inflate the TOC.

md041._comment: First line must be top-level heading: false negatives on .md files that intentionally start with a callout / TOC.
